_comment: Source of truth for Fitz Watch's regulatory countdown engine. Edit via PR; quarterly review reminder for the maintainer. Schema matches spec section 10.1.

changes.name: Payday super commencement
changes.summary: Super Guarantee must be paid on the same day as wages, not quarterly. Triggers SGC + admin fee from the first missed remittance.

changes.name: NSW Workers Comp Reform — Psychological injury changes
changes.summary: New 31% WPI threshold for psych injury, 130-week cap on weekly benefits, amended reasonable management action defence ('significant cause' test).

changes.name: NSW Codes of Practice — Enforceable benchmark
changes.summary: SafeWork NSW Codes of Practice become the enforceable benchmark for psychosocial risk management — including bullying, sexual harassment, customer aggression and high job demands.

changes.name: Paid Parental Leave — 26 weeks
changes.summary: Government PPL expands to 26 weeks at the National Minimum Wage. Includes super contributions on PPL payments.

changes.name: SA construction fall protection threshold → 2m
changes.summary: South Australian construction work requires fall protection from 2 metres (previously 3 metres). Affects venues with construction/maintenance work.

changes.name: Workplace Exposure Limits replace WES
changes.summary: New national Workplace Exposure Limits replace the previous Workplace Exposure Standards. Affects kitchens, cleaning chemicals, refrigeration plant, smoke.

changes.name: NSW Workers Comp WPI threshold → 27%
changes.summary: NSW psychological injury Whole Person Impairment threshold steps from 31% to 27%, broadening the range of compensable claims.
